span.p:
scheduler 申请 lease
满足全局 + per-project 并发上限?

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
skip 本轮 poll
下一轮再试

color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
retry: 写 retry_scheduled
main loop 到点重新 dispatch

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
push branch + create/update MR
workpad note + handoff note
label = human-review

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Reviewer 在 GitLab 上做什么?

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: reviewer 评论 / label 改为 ai-rework

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: reviewer 关闭 MR 不合并

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Phase 3: ci-feedback scanner
每轮 poll 读 MR pipeline

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
on_failure: ai-rework
label 翻 ai-rework + marker note

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
on_failure: human-review
仅写 marker note + emit observed

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
success / running / pending
保持 human-review

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Phase 4: review-feedback sweep
读 MR notes → ReviewFeedbackSummary

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
下一轮 dispatch 把
## Review feedback 块注入 prompt

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
orchestrator 写 closing note
移除 human-review + close issue

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Phase 2: dashboard 操作
retry / stop / archive
触发 operator_action_* 事件

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Phase 5: workspace retention
每 cleanup_interval_ms 一次 sweep

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
planner: 输入 retention + entries
active 永不删 / successful 7d / failed-blocked 30d

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
executor: rm 过期 worktree
emit workspace_cleanup_*
